title: Filter flights by origin and destination and view results
description: Verifies that users can enter origin and destination filters and see a list of matching flight cards after loading completes.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a common city name into the origin field
Fill a common city name into the destination field
Wait for the loading state to finish
Verify a list of flight cards is displayed

title: Empty state when no flights match filters
description: Verifies that the home page shows an empty state when the filters return no flights.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a rare or unlikely city name into the origin field
Fill a rare or unlikely city name into the destination field
Wait for the loading state to finish
Verify an empty state message is visible

title: Home page handles backend fetch failure gracefully
description: Verifies that the home page surfaces a fetch error state when flight results cannot be loaded.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a common city name into the origin field
Fill a common city name into the destination field
Wait for the loading state to finish
Verify a fetch error state is visible

title: Origin-only input does not break results rendering
description: Verifies that entering only an origin does not crash the UI and results area renders as either flights or an empty state after loading.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a common city name into the origin field
Wait for the loading state to finish
Verify either flight cards are displayed or an empty state message is visible

title: Destination-only input does not break results rendering
description: Verifies that entering only a destination does not crash the UI and results area renders as either flights or an empty state after loading.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a common city name into the destination field
Wait for the loading state to finish
Verify either flight cards are displayed or an empty state message is visible

title: Clearing filters returns to unfiltered state rendering
description: Verifies that clearing origin and destination inputs returns the listing area to a valid unfiltered state after loading.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a common city name into the origin field
Fill a common city name into the destination field
Wait for the loading state to finish
Clear the origin field
Clear the destination field
Wait for the loading state to finish
Verify the flights listing area shows a valid state such as flight cards or an empty state message

title: Changing filters updates the flight list
description: Verifies that updating the origin and destination values triggers an updated results list after loading completes.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a common city name into the origin field
Fill a common city name into the destination field
Wait for the loading state to finish
Replace the origin field value with a different common city name
Replace the destination field value with a different common city name
Wait for the loading state to finish
Verify the flight cards reflect the updated filter state by showing a valid list or an empty state message

title: Home page initial load renders primary search UI
description: Verifies that the home page loads and shows the origin and destination search inputs.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify origin and destination search inputs are visible

title: Successful VIP registration redirects to login
description: Verifies that a new user can submit valid signup data and is routed to the login page on success.

steps.description: Navigate to /vip
Fill a valid full name into the name field
Fill a unique email value into the email field
Fill a valid passport value into the passport field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the login page

title: VIP registration shows field validation for incomplete submission
description: Verifies that submitting the VIP registration form with missing values shows validation errors.

steps.description: Navigate to /vip
Leave the registration fields empty
Submit the registration form
Verify validation errors are visible for the invalid fields

title: VIP registration shows field validation for invalid email format
description: Verifies that entering an invalid email surfaces an email validation error on submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /vip
Fill a valid full name into the name field
Fill an invalid email format into the email field
Fill a valid passport value into the passport field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: VIP registration duplicate email error
description: Verifies that attempting to register with an already-registered email shows a duplicate email error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /vip
Fill a valid full name into the name field
Fill an email value that is already registered into the email field
Fill a valid passport value into the passport field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a duplicate email error is visible

title: VIP registration page loads primary signup form
description: Verifies that the VIP registration page loads and displays the registration form fields.

steps.description: Navigate to /vip
Verify the VIP registration form is displayed

title: VIP registration password required validation
description: Verifies that leaving the password empty shows a validation error on submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /vip
Fill a valid full name into the name field
Fill a unique email value into the email field
Fill a valid passport value into the passport field
Leave the password field empty
Submit the registration form
Verify a password validation error is visible

title: Successful VIP login navigates to home
description: Verifies that a VIP user can log in with valid credentials and is routed to the home page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the home page

title: Invalid VIP login shows error toast
description: Verifies that submitting incorrect credentials shows an authentication error toast.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill a valid email format into the email field
Fill an incorrect password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials error toast is visible

title: VIP login page loads primary login form
description: Verifies that the login page loads and displays the email and password inputs.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Verify the login form is displayed

title: VIP login requires email and password validation
description: Verifies that submitting the login form with empty fields shows validation errors.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Leave the email field empty
Leave the password field empty
Submit the login form
Verify validation errors are visible for the invalid fields

title: VIP login invalid email format validation
description: Verifies that entering an invalid email format prevents successful submission and surfaces a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill an invalid email format into the email field
Fill a password value into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Unauthenticated booking attempt is blocked with login-required feedback
description: Verifies that a user who is not logged in cannot submit a flight booking and is shown a login-required error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Adjust passenger counts for adults, children, or infants
Click the booking button on a flight card
Verify a login-required error is visible

title: Authenticated user can book a flight and see a success confirmation
description: Verifies the end-to-end booking submission path for a logged-in VIP user from the home page results in a visible success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to return to the home page
Adjust passenger counts for adults, children, or infants
Click the booking button on a flight card
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Passenger selector enforces minimum one adult
description: Verifies the UI prevents selecting a booking with zero adults via the passenger selector constraint.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Adjust passenger counts to set adults to zero
Verify an adult count validation error is visible

title: My Bookings page loads and shows bookings list or empty state for authenticated user
description: Verifies that an authenticated VIP user can open My Bookings and see either their bookings list or an empty state after loading completes.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the My Bookings link from the navbar
Wait for the bookings list to load
Verify booked flights are displayed or an empty state message is visible

title: Unauthenticated access to My Bookings shows an auth-related error or empty state
description: Verifies the observable UI outcome when visiting My Bookings without being logged in (auth error or inconsistent empty state).

steps.description: Navigate to /my-bookings
Wait for the bookings list to load
Verify an authentication error is visible or an empty state message is visible

title: Language toggle switches the interface language from the navbar
description: Verifies that toggling language updates visible labels across the interface.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the language toggle button
Verify translated labels are updated across the interface

title: Language toggle can be switched back to the original language
description: Verifies that users can toggle the language twice and the UI returns to the original language state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the language toggle button
Click the language toggle button
Verify the interface labels match the original language state

title: Home page flight discovery surface remains usable after language toggle
description: Verifies that after changing language, core home page content for flight discovery remains visible and usable.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the language toggle button
Verify flights are visible
